div1.entryFree:
Lowliness, 1) mean condition: thou the beggar; for so witnesseth thy l. LLL IV, 1, 81. witness the night, your garments, your l. H5 IV, 8, 55.
2) freedom from pride, meekness, humility: with as humble l. of mind, H6A V, 5, 18. l. is young ambition's ladder, Caes. II, 1, 22. the king-becoming graces, . . . as mercy, l., devotion, Mcb. IV, 3, 93.
